allow: PowerShell(cd d:\\DYSPO\\APP\\DyspoApp; $ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; $out = \(npx ng build --configuration development\) 2>&1; $lines = $out -split "`n"; $errors = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match "^Error:|error NG" }; Write-Host "NG Errors: $\($errors.Count\)"; $errors | Select-Object -First 15; Write-Host "---Last 5---"; $lines | Select-Object -Last 5)
